steps.title: Follow the concession
steps.content: The sentence says scholars often treat Fauset's work as representative of the Harlem Renaissance, then adds but to warn that this link can obscure subtleties. The blank should allow the characterization to seem very strong before the limitation appears.

steps.title: Pick the strongest seeming case
steps.content: A suggests arrogance, B suggests mismatch, and D suggests controversy; none sets up the concession as cleanly. Irrefutable means impossible to dispute, which fits the idea that the reasons may seem strong even though the link is limited. The answer is C.
